ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the customer */,
  "number_of_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents the customer has */,
  "has_chronic_disease" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer has a chronic disease */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Employment type of the customer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the customer works */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer in USD */,
  "previously_bought_insurance" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer has previously bought insurance */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "health_risk_factor" REAL /* Composite score indicating overall health risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_scores" (
  "insurance_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance score record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Calculated insurance score */,
  "insurance_level" TEXT /* Level of insurance coverage based on the score */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was last calculated */,
  "score_factors" TEXT /* Factors contributing to the score in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_scores_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_status" (
  "insurance_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance status record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "date_insured" TEXT /* Date when the customer was last insured */,
  "is_insured" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer is currently insured */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the current policy */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the current policy */,
  "renewal_reminder_sent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a renewal reminder has been sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_status_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_details" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of employment */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Specific job title */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the current industry */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_details_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
